---
mode: 'agent'
---
Your goal is to generate a new HTML page for the website. The page should be similar to the existing pages in terms of layout and design.

Every new HTML page should have a search bar added, similar to the search bar that's available on the features.html, templates.html, and collections.html pages.

Any new page should also be added to the end (far right) of the top nav bar of the website.

Every code change needs to be tested before it's committed. Run `bundle exec jekyll serve` automatically for me so that I can test.
